title: Fantastic FPS
description: this modpack was created specifically to play peacefully without any kind of lag.
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Fantastic_FPS/BH_FFPS_header.webp)
![About](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Fantastic_FPS/BH_FFPS_about.webp)
Minecraftians welcome to Fantastic FPS modpack! This modpack is specially made to play peacefully without any kind of lag, create a world with or without your friends and have fun without any kind of lag!
![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Fantastic_FPS/BH_FFPS_features.webp)

                                                                Boosted FPS

                                                             Decreased RAM Usage

                                                                Fast Loading

**NORMAL MINECRAFT**

**FPS BOOSTED**
